science_subject.key_measurement: Planck 2018 ΛCDM: Ω_m ≈ 0.315, H₀ ≈ 67.4 km/s/Mpc; JWST detects galaxies within ~400 Myr after Big Bang
science_subject.visualization_prompt: scientific visualization galaxy formation in expanding universe, dark matter halo skeleton, baryonic gas cooling into disk, minor merger building stellar halo, spiral structure emergence, NOT TO SCALE cosmological simulation, 16:9 fidelity

config.voice_suffix: clear enthusiastic science communicator voice, precise but accessible diction, synthetic presenter only

shots.video_prompt: CONTINUITY LOCK @Julian-001: identical presenter face, smart-casual wardrobe, seamless neutral set, same eye-line to camera — seamless continuation of prior take, zero jump cut. CONTINUITY LOCK @Set-Seamless-Neutral-001: identical neutral grey seamless — same backdrop tone mid-grey #9A9A98, same floor sweep, same subject-to-backdrop distance, same falloff — seamless continuation, zero jump cut. STYLE LOCK @Style-Cool-Clinical-001: cool-clinical grade — neutral white balance, low saturation, accurate color reproduction, minimal stylistic grading, science and product trust, no warm cozy cast, no film grain. Presenter addresses camera on seamless neutral, crisp science hook. Camera: locked medium, direct address. Neutral seamless 5500K bilateral soft key locked — symmetrical wrap, subtle nose shadow only, zero hue drift, no magenta vignette, no warm/cool lateral split. Neutral 5600–6500K even field — shadow definition for shape only, no gel, no warm practicals in frame. COLOR LOCK Seamless-Neutral: backdrop #9A9A98±2%, skin true-to-life, wardrobe colors accurate, no gel spill — no magenta edge gradient, no orange spotlight cone. GRADE LOCK Cool-Clinical: grey axis neutral, skin neither pink nor yellow pushed, saturation -15% global — forbid magenta tint, forbid orange warmth, forbid teal skin on shadows, forbid vintage fade. Locked-off or slow linear track; no handheld. Lip-synced, delivers: "The night sky looks peaceful — but every galaxy is a collision story written across billions of years. How did islands of a trillion stars grow from nearly uniform gas?" clear enthusiastic science communicator voice, precise but accessible diction, synthetic presenter only. Finish on presentational gesture peak, never hold dead stillness or dead frame.
shots.speech_text: The night sky looks peaceful — but every galaxy is a collision story written across billions of years. How did islands of a trillion stars grow from nearly uniform gas?

shots.video_prompt: CONTINUITY LOCK @Julian-001: identical presenter face, smart-casual wardrobe, seamless neutral set, same eye-line to camera — seamless continuation of prior take, zero jump cut. CONTINUITY LOCK @Set-Seamless-Neutral-001: identical neutral grey seamless — same backdrop tone mid-grey #9A9A98, same floor sweep, same subject-to-backdrop distance, same falloff — seamless continuation, zero jump cut. STYLE LOCK @Style-Cool-Clinical-001: cool-clinical grade — neutral white balance, low saturation, accurate color reproduction, minimal stylistic grading, science and product trust, no warm cozy cast, no film grain. Presenter explains the phenomenon plainly, motivated gesture, clinical lighting. Camera: slow push-in medium. Neutral seamless 5500K bilateral soft key locked — symmetrical wrap, subtle nose shadow only, zero hue drift, no magenta vignette, no warm/cool lateral split. Neutral 5600–6500K even field — shadow definition for shape only, no gel, no warm practicals in frame. COLOR LOCK Seamless-Neutral: backdrop #9A9A98±2%, skin true-to-life, wardrobe colors accurate, no gel spill — no magenta edge gradient, no orange spotlight cone. GRADE LOCK Cool-Clinical: grey axis neutral, skin neither pink nor yellow pushed, saturation -15% global — forbid magenta tint, forbid orange warmth, forbid teal skin on shadows, forbid vintage fade. Locked-off or slow linear track; no handheld. Lip-synced, delivers: "In our standard model, invisible dark matter clumps first, forming gravitational scaffolds. Ordinary gas falls in, cools, and condenses into stars. Small galaxies merge into larger ones — spirals, ellipticals, and messy intermediates along the way." clear enthusiastic science communicator voice, precise but accessible diction, synthetic presenter only. Finish on presentational gesture peak, never hold dead stillness or dead frame.
shots.speech_text: In our standard model, invisible dark matter clumps first, forming gravitational scaffolds. Ordinary gas falls in, cools, and condenses into stars. Small galaxies merge into larger ones — spirals, ellipticals, and messy intermediates along the way.

Presenter cites measurement, experiment, or observation chain — evidence-forward tone. Camera: medium — gesture to evidence. Neutral seamless 5500K bilateral soft key locked — symmetrical wrap, subtle nose shadow only, zero hue drift, no magenta vignette, no warm/cool lateral split. Neutral 5600–6500K even field — shadow definition for shape only, no gel, no warm practicals in frame. JWST now images surprisingly mature galaxies when the universe was only a few hundred million years old. Finish on presentational gesture peak, never hold dead stillness or dead frame.
shots.speech_text: The cosmic microwave background — mapped by Planck — shows tiny density ripples that seeded structure. JWST now images surprisingly mature galaxies when the universe was only a few hundred million years old. Hubble deep fields show mergers frozen in mid-collision.
